title: Velvety Sour Thai Passion Fruit Stir-fry
description: This show-off dish features a velvety texture made from passion fruit pulp mixed with other ingredients in a quick stir-fry that is both healthy and satisfying.

ingredients.name: 1 cup jasmine rice, cooked and cooled

instructions: Blend the passion fruit pulp with soy sauce, fish sauce, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and bell pepper; stir-fry for about 2 minutes until slightly softened.
Add garlic and ginger paste, stirring for an additional minute.
Pour the passion fruit mixture into the pan, along with cooled cooked jasmine rice. Toss everything together to combine and achieve a velvety texture.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish.
